! ChIMES Single-Layer Water Parameters for Publication (DOI: TBD)
!
! These parameters correspond to a ChIMES single-layer water model, for water at 300 to 2000K and densities in the range of 1-1.25 g/ml.
! The model was developed to compare the performance of single layer and multilayer ChIMES models against classical potential.
! It is not a fully optimized representation for general water simulations and is intended primarily for benchmarking purposes.
